description: An agent needs to compile and draft an environmental permit application for a new battery storage facility.

nodes.task_description: Identify all required local, state, and federal environmental permits for a battery storage project at the given location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a checklist of all necessary permits.

nodes.task_description: Gather project specifications, including battery chemistry, thermal management system, and fire suppression plan.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles all relevant technical documents.

nodes.task_description: Draft the main application form, referencing the compiled technical data and impact assessments.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a completed draft of the primary permit application.
